title: 11 injured in N2 Mossel Bay crash
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A collision between a taxi...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A collision between a taxi and a bakkie on the N2 near the Engen Mossel Bay 1 Stop left 11 people injured this afternoon, 26 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A collision between a taxi and a bakkie on the N2 near the Engen Mossel Bay 1 Stop left 11 people injured this afternoon, 26 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KwaNonqaba Police Station spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp said the crash occurred just before 16:30 and that eight occupants from the taxi and three from the bakkie sustained injuries.","html":"KwaNonqaba Police Station spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp said the crash occurred just before 16:30 and that eight occupants from the taxi and three from the bakkie sustained injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They were transported by various emergency medical services to nearby hospitals for treatment. The severity of the injuries is unclear at this stage.","html":"They were transported by various emergency medical services to nearby hospitals for treatment. The severity of the injuries is unclear at this stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said a case of reckless and negligent driving has been opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and that the circumstances surrounding the crash form part of the investigation.","html":"Kapp said a case of reckless and negligent driving has been opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and that the circumstances surrounding the crash form part of the investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: 11 injured in N2 Mossel Bay crash
